tables: Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPESSC UP TET 2026 Answer Key

Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) has released the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPTET 2026 Answer Key Notice. Those Candidates are Enrolled to the Following Exam Can Download Answer Key .candidates should read the UPTET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPTET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Primary and Junior Level, information and other types of information and then apply.

Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET 2026) Primary and Junior Level UPTET 2026 Advt. No 01/UPTET/2026 | Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 27/03/2026 Last Date for Registration : 03/05/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 03/05/2026 Last Date Correction : 08/05/2026 Exam Date : 02-04 July 2026 Exam City Available : 22/06/2026 Admit Card Available : 30/06/2026 Answer Key Available : 08/07/2026 Result Declared : As per Schedule

Application Fee General / OBC / EWS: 1000/- SC / ST : 500/- PH (Divyang) : 300/- Pay the Examination Fee Through SBI I Collect Fee Mode Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay the Exam Through SBI E Challan Fee Mode, Submit Fee Any Branches of SBI
UPTET 2021 Primary I to V & Junior VI to VIII Eligibility UPTET Languages Available: Hindi, English, Urdu, Sanskrit

Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with Passed / Appeared DELED (Final Year) Exam OR Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 50% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) OR Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 45% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) (As per NCTE Norms) OR 10+2 Intermediate 50% Marks with 4 Year B.ElEd  OR More Details Read Notification.

Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with 50% Marks with B.Ed / B.Ed Special Exam Passed / Appearing (Final Year) OR Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with BTC Training 2 Year Exam Passed OR 10+2 Intermediate Exam with 50% Marks and B.LEd 4 Year Course OR 10+2 Inter Exam with 50% Marks and B.SC Ed Exam Passed Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 45% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) (As per NCTE Norms) OR More Details Read Notification.

Sarkari Result® : How to Fill UPTET 2026 Online Form Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC), Prayagraj Are Released Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPTET Examination 2026. Candidate Can Apply Between 27/03/2026 to 03/05/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in UPTET Primary and Junior Level 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form. For the latest updates on Sarkari Result, admit card, answer key, and result, always visit SarkariResult.com, the official website for Sarkari Result in India (Since 2012).
